reviews.review_description: See the meta logo, loads up and nothing happens, just see my non VR environment. At first a pop up says, Won't work in a laying down position, even though I was seated, looking straight ahead and headset was level. Even reset the view a few times, no affect so I shut off the laying down setting and that stopped the pop up, but the app never appeared. I also tried adjusting my environment to no avail. Thank goodness it was free!

For me this was the Killer App for Quest devices. 
But it never connected to my computer, they removed the space customization, they removed the whiteboard. 
...If you need technical support go and ask to someone at the grocery store, it will be a lot more useful.
Hey Meta: Make it OpenSource!     LET US FIX IT!!

Update for Workrooms fans looking for a new home: If you loved Worksrooms... I recommend trying Fluid! They are actively developing and listening to feedback from the community.  They just recently added Meta avatars and they increased the room capacity to more than Workrooms 🙌

As a community we will start meeting there, there's a $20 one time fee but for something in active development, I think it's worth it!  

They have some DLC like extra environments like Walkabout mini golf that you pay one time to have lifetime access. 

There's also an optional Ultra subscription but it's only needed for power users who want a few more upgrades, think high resolution desktop, desktop screen sharing with others and unlock all environments for just $10 per month if you need those features. 

If just keeps getting better, I don't have any affiliation with them just want to help others looking for a new home for meetings and community.  Join us, the Workrooms Community has been meeting every Friday for 3+ years now but we will switch over to Fluid 

---


When I first tried Workrooms my first thought was this is amazing! Then my next thought was... Now I need to find some people to use Workrooms with since I work from home and home can be anywhere in the world as a digital nomad. 

So I created the Workrooms Community Meetups to cowork and meet others who are excited about productivity and working in VR.

Now for 2+ years we've been coworking together and hosting the Workrooms Community Meetup every Friday 🙌

There's no app available quite like Workrooms, if you haven't given it a try yet download the app, install Remote Desktop to connect your computer inside and get 3 virtual screens! Plus get a table of your colleagues or friends to join you.  Better yet, drop by the Workrooms Community and make a whole table full of new friends this Friday! 

Go to Facebook and look for the 'Horizon Workrooms Community' and I'll see you there 😁

Or add me on Quest and send me a DM

I use this app almost everyday with my team.  However, recently, as I'm adding new members, there seems to be an issue with the app.  New users that download the app can't get it to launch properly.  The app downloads and installs normally, but when the users launches the app it launches into a black screen and just hangs there.  There is no other option but to exit out of the app.   We really need this issue to be fixed.

When I first downloaded the app, it would only show a black screen on launch, making it completely unusable. There was no clear error message or guidance, so I assumed it was just broken.

After about a month, I finally discovered the workaround: you have to create a Workrooms account on the web first, and then the app will actually work. Once I did that, the app functioned as expected.
Great app.  Why do you cancel it? Do not understand.
Black screen only (december 2025))
It Is Awsome And Greate Do Not Remove Meta Horizon WorkRoom Beta PLS META DONT DELETE IT
Great App, Thanks for the brilliant developers
Downloading and opening in Nov 2025 just takes you to a black screen.

The app doesent work, you start it and sometimes notting happens and sometimes black screen.
Pls fix it

reviews.review_title: Mac os 26 cant create multiple screens
reviews.review_description: When trying to create second screen app closes sessions and restarts with 1screen
Quest 2 and can’t join rooms with code

This app doesn't work. 
The invitation link you can send to others or receive from other, doesn't take you to the room. All it is doing is opening the app, but you cant connect to a meeting room with the connection code it is giving. Every time it tells you it is an invalid code. 

I tried it back and forward with two headset, but nothing worked.

reviews.review_title: Its soooo good i love it
reviews.review_description: Good

I’ve had trouble when trying to have someone join my room.  Last time, I finally got it to work by scheduling a meeting on the calendar.  This time we bailed after 20 mins.  It typically works pretty well for me as a single user with 2 screens

If there was an option for the presenter to upload a Virtual model in *.Obj for example and place it on top of a table or platform that also allowed navigation in the model in a tree hierarchy (turning off and on the sub-parts) it would be a dream for product model evaluations that require multidisciplinary engineering teams. Think about it Mark Zuckerberg.

Whiteboard is what made having the boardroom so efficient trying to get particular people’s computers to link on so that they can view it. It’s just not as efficient when it comes to brainstorming and putting it visually on the whiteboard if you can, please allow the whiteboard back into the app..


Thank you

Horizon Workrooms is a great virtual display app. The app is rock solid stable, and connects quickly and reliably. They removes the whiteboard and some other features, but brought more adjustment to the screens.

This app is actually really great to work in, and could use attention in terms of offering more virtual office environments. Seems like this would be a simple task given Meta's capabilities. 

I use this more often than Immersed due to the reliability of the connection.
Ver

This app had so much promise, the whiteboard being my favourite thing about it. It was by far and away, the best of its kind available on quest. I used it all the time, the writing was fluid, it was genuinely useful. Yes, some tweaks could have been made, but why...WHY ditch it?!? Please, bring it back.

I love being able to have huge virtual screens in a non-distracting environment when I really need to focus.  

Wishes:
1. Ability to allow some app windows from the quest OS
2. Ability to choose some different office environments or just have my desk in my quest immersive home environments (whatever they're called)

This is a way more polished app than Immersed, even though the features are minimalistic.  It didn't seem like anyone at Meta cares about this app, even though they should.

I would recommend this app if you're looking to have up to 5 virtual monitors for quiet working.   I haven't tried any of the collaboration features, so can't comment there.

I like this but it’s a bit basic. From what I can gather it had a lot of features once and was rolled back,  nothing much has happened since. I’m new to VR and I wonder if there is not enough people to make developing it worth while yet. Immersed on the other hand appears to be very active and although I don’t find it as crisp I think it will be the one to stick with for me
In order to make it easier for more Chinese people to use it, I hope to support simplified or traditional Chinese in the future！
I use this app everyday, works smother on my WiFi 7, I have a very comfortable environment and I can focus on my work…

I used to use this app just to do some work and stuff and I come back after a while and look at it now! The quest pro even came with whiteboard tips, but for what! The whiteboard was removed and now all I can do is speak, raise my hand, and show my screen which is all useless and I could have just used Google meet or zoom! I can't believe this. Nothing special about this anymore.

reviews.review_title: Does anyone listen to the users?
reviews.review_description:
Like many here I loved the app before the recent 'improvements'.
I encouraged my work colleages to buy headsets to allow us to collaborate.
Now it is a waste of time, basically just a screen in a 3d rooom - pointless

Why did you remove the old great features like the whiteboard?? My team used it a lot for productivity now the app is just like remote desktop to display my laptop to my vr. If you want to remove any old feature, the whiteboard isn't what you should remove, it was amazing!

This is a great productivity app for people that travel frequently. It's simple to set up and gives me multiple large monitors anywhere that I can sit down. For me, this is my killer app for the quest 3.

The work you recently did to the app is a complete disaster. The app now is not usable: one can't even join the room. 

I was promoting it before as a great tool for online meetings, but after the new release it's cut, ugly and useless. 

Not well done. This is not the quality of software we expect from Meta.

I used this as to work in and it was very easy to set up and a nice work environment. When I tried to arrange a meeting, though, the whole thing became a nightmare. They give you the option to send a meeting link via chat or WhatsApp but they don't work. What's not made clear, (it's in very small greyed-out text) is that you have to go to Workrooms dot com (can't use URLs in these comments) and set up a meeting there. If you don't you, even though you can still generate a meeting code, (you shouldn't be able to if you haven't visited workrooms dot com) it won't work. We wasted an hour trying to get this working. Once we managed to meet it was a useful experience, but with some very odd design decisions. My microphone was red and off and nothing I could do would turn it on. We had to use voice chat. They've also removed the whiteboard and the ability to change the keyboard cut-out size. Also, screen sizes are very low resolution, crazy decisions. Hopefully they will add the whiteboard back in and add more  environments and features that work more intuitively.

Wow, spent over 2 hours trying to have a meeting with my friend.  The link did not work and then when trying the 6 digit code, the app said it was expired even though it was just provided.  Probably the most buggy app I have used.  Amazed that Meta would release this, how much is their dev budget?

Working on the road hunched over a small laptop, a thing of the past. I actually use this all the time now on computers that only have a single monitor or otherwise feel restricted. Works flawlessly, rooms and meetings are excellent and super clear and comfortable on Quest 3

That appears to be Meta’s design philosophy:

Meta: “Does it bring you joy?”
Users: “Yes”
Meta, internally: “Kill it…KILL IT!”

I only recently got the MQ3, but looked up what this app used to be…WOW. Just wow.

In fairness to Meta, they’re no better or worse than other tech companies infected with the brain rot of enshittification or breaking what worked 🤷🏻‍♂️

reviews.review_title: I know this is a beta but Geeze
reviews.review_description: I got this app and done all of the necessary actions to connect but when trying to connect my MacBook, it just keeps rotating but never connecting so I don’t know how to app actually works because I can’t connect my computer and there’s no way to get help in the app to figure it out

What have you done Meta why whyyyyyy😭😭😭i was supposed to be an upgrade not a downgrade. Why were allll the functions removed like at least please ADD PREVIOUS VERSION OF THIS APP AS AN OPTION TO DOWNLOAD
Yeah, they just like completely e the app. I figure it's because they want to promote other apps that charge you for the features that this app previously had for free that they now removed.
Returning quest. This app was why I bought. Hope this helps
Not sure why a lot of features were removed from this app

reviews.review_title: Please add support for connect via cable
reviews.review_description: I used this app with my MacBook it is wonderful, but for work I need to use VPN, and as a result connection speed is awful. Please add support to connect the PC via cable like Oculus link it is really helpful

reviews.review_title: new and never lunched in the app
reviews.review_description: Can not figure out what’s wrong with my settings, other app like immersed or Remote Desktop can lunch properly but not with this beta version of workrooms.

With the latest update the PC app stopped logging in. Attempted to uninstall/reinstall and now the web page wont let me download the app because it thinks it's already installed.

The removal of some of the sharing features actually made this better for our enterprise purposes, but the absolute shambolic nature of supports and basic availability makes this impossible to rely upon for any practical professional use.

reviews.review_title: What happened with the latest update???
reviews.review_description: Usability has taken a huge step back. I used to mirror my desktop and work with intricate menus in CAD and other applications seamlessly. Now I can’t move my mouse pointer without it floating on its own! I don’t really care about simplifying and removing features, but mirroring your computer has become useless. It was really great to have up to three large screens to work on in a cool environment. I wish I had the ability to roll back the updates, please fix this. ￼

This was a great app when it started, even for solo use.  Then someone with a gigantic brain had the best idea ever: let's incapacitate it!

Just cruel.
Why would you remove the whiteboard?

reviews.review_title: Thanks for the update. I hate it.
reviews.review_description: They had a great thing going and they ruined everything that made the app great by removing the white board and keyboard features. It was the best thing out there for study groups, tutoring, and test prep in a distraction free environment. There's really no added benefit over Zoom. It's just a much more complicated novelty version of Zoom. Don't waste your time.

I think it would be much better if you removed the entire app if you are not satisfied with it instead of removing most of its features and making it worse.

I couldn't understand why they just made worse , they are going reverse 😕 .

I think they are destroying their products by their hands.

reviews.review_title: Meta needs a new product manager
reviews.review_description:
At launch:
"Hey guys, we should build a VR app that lets remote teams easily do things that are difficult over Zoom. Like see each other's gestures, use a whiteboard together, stuff like that."

Years later:
"Let's scrap all the useful features and just be Zoom in VR."

There's really very little point to this app anymore. You can't even customize your office. Meta is making some awfully weird decisions lately.
they removed vital features like whiteboard and room changed , they completely nerf the app experience

I have it working, but barely any functional features one would like to see. I can't pitch this to a manager. Still feels like it's a proof of concept or an aplha, not beta. Could use more keyboard/mouse support, screen adjustments, desk adjustments, and more customizable environments. Also needs to integrate enterprise software, such as Teams or other productivity and communication tools.

I’m not sure if you 
Ну

App has tones of potential but no audio from my windows remote desktop.  Show stopper for me, I need audio for my work and it’d be nice to sceen share with audio.  Bigscreen can do this but its a bit of an ordeal to setup. Feature doesnt seem to be mentioned in release notes/ hopefully they add it soon.

reviews.review_title: A game changer for distributed teams
reviews.review_description: Add the ability to play ambient sound in the workroom, make the stylus tracking a bit more precise, add drink detection and 3d object modeling, and most office work can be done through this platform.

Desired feature list

Open browser and share content.  Cut  crop and paste images from browser.

Play content from browser 

Use hands in app to select and draw., and erase

Hey, the app seems to be a wonder but I tried everything out to connect my laptop to share screen and files but it's impossible, and online there's no apparent solution and many others have this issue, please fix it
Can somone help me figure out why we can't hear each other in this space? We are unmuted, can hear music/sound affects but not each other talking.

I think some of these reviews are pretty critical. On macOS I had no trouble with the Workrooms client. I was able to collab with a co-worker and we actually got a lot done, debugging an issue. I can see this being improved (such as being able to zoom or re-size the screen), but there’s a lot of features out of the box. I’m not a pro-meta individual, but this software is pretty slick. I love the virtual desk and pass through keyboard. I hope that Workrooms will someday support non-meta headsets as well.
Workrooms takes virtual meetings beyond "meetings" and into a relm of infinite possibilities. The future is now.
